title: hedeoma microphylla
intro: Hedeoma microphylla, also known as Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, for its ability to repel insects and improve digestion. The health benefits of Hedeoma microphylla include reducing menstrual cramps, alleviating nausea, and exhibiting anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be extracted through steam distillation.
